relics.name: 破碎怀表
relics.description: 每场战斗第一回合多抽 1 张牌。
relics.imagePrompt: broken pocket watch relic, cracked glass, stopped hands

relics.name: 血色戒指
relics.description: 每次造成流血时回复 1 点生命。
relics.imagePrompt: blood ring relic, crimson gem, dark metal band

relics.name: 旧骑士徽章
relics.description: 每回合第一次打出防御牌效果 +2。
relics.imagePrompt: old knight badge relic, worn crest, tarnished silver

relics.name: 恶魔骰子
relics.description: 战斗开始时随机一张手牌费用变为 0。
relics.imagePrompt: demon dice relic, black bone dice, red pips

relics.name: 灰烬吊坠
relics.description: 每场战斗第一次生命低于 50% 时获得 2 点能量。
relics.imagePrompt: ash pendant relic, gray cinder stone, silver chain

relics.name: 记忆碎片
relics.description: 战斗胜利额外获得 10 金币。
relics.imagePrompt: memory shard relic, glowing crystal fragment

relics.name: 铁护符
relics.description: 战斗开始时获得 4 点格挡。

relics.name: 诅咒硬币
relics.imagePrompt: cursed coin relic, tarnished gold, dark aura

relics.name: 疗愈香膏
relics.description: 休息点额外回复 5 点生命。
relics.imagePrompt: healer salve relic, small jar, herbal paste

relics.name: 虚空透镜
relics.description: 精英战斗胜利额外获得 15 金币。
relics.imagePrompt: void lens relic, dark glass orb

relics.name: 荆棘镣铐
relics.description: 受到攻击伤害后，对敌人施加 1 层流血。
relics.imagePrompt: thornmail shackles relic, rusted chains with spikes

relics.name: 奥术电池
relics.description: 每回合第一次打出技能牌额外获得 1 点能量。
relics.imagePrompt: arcane battery relic, glowing crystal capacitor

relics.name: 猎人信物
relics.description: 每回合第一次攻击额外造成 3 点伤害。
relics.imagePrompt: hunter token relic, carved bone talisman

relics.name: 誓约之盾
relics.description: 每回合开始时获得 2 点格挡。
relics.imagePrompt: vow shield relic, small enchanted buckler

relics.name: 记忆王冠
relics.description: 击败 Boss 额外获得 30 金币。
relics.imagePrompt: memory crown relic, fractured golden circlet
